prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Magnuson TVS2650 (engine code: SRT 6.2L HEMI Hellcat V8 - ESF) with a 3.0L rotor set, 10-rib serpentine drive system, and a custom billet aluminum pulley (2.5" diameter) to push boost from 11.6 psi to 18 psi, paired with a Hellcat Redeye fuel pump (522 LPH) and ID1000x injectors for E85 compatibility

Full exhaust overhaul with a custom 3.5" stainless steel dual-exit system by Corsa Performance (cat-back), featuring 409-grade mandrel-bent tubing, quad 5" black tips, and a valved X-pipe with Borla Pro XS mufflers for aggressive backpressure reduction without drone

Suspension reinforcement with a KW Suspensions Clubsport coilover kit (3-way adjustable damping, 80mm-120mm ride height range) paired with Hellcat-specific sway bars from Hotchkis (28mm front, 25mm rear) and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension (full subframe and control arm kit) to eliminate body roll during 0.98g lateral acceleration
estetica: Widebody conversion using the Dodge Performance Parts (DPP) Hellcat Redeye Durango fender flares (carbon fiber, bolt-on) to accommodate a 2-inch wider track with 22x12" front and 22x13" rear Forgeline GA3R wheels (ET25 offset, 325/35R22 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires)

Front splitter and rear diffuser from Anderson Composites (carbon fiber, Hellcat-specific) with integrated air curtains and a 3D-printed underbody diffuser panel by APR Performance to reduce lift by 40% at 120 mph

Custom vinyl wrap by 3M (Matte Military Green with Gloss Black Hellcat stripes) paired with a Hellcat Redeye grille badge (OEM+ from Mopar) and sequential LED taillights by Diode Dynamics (C-Model, plug-and-play) for a retro-modern aesthetic
